dropdown_prompts.name: Flash Idea (1-2 Sentences)
dropdown_prompts.description: Best for: Quick brainstorming, a single impactful line, or a very brief character thought.
dropdown_prompts.prompt_template: Generate a flash idea or a very brief thought in 1-2 concise sentences about: [USER_INPUT_STORY_IDEA]. Make it impactful and to the point.
dropdown_prompts.post_processing_note: Prioritize sentence count. If over 2 sentences, trim to the closest natural sentence break at 2 sentences.

dropdown_prompts.name: Vignette (3-5 Sentences)
dropdown_prompts.description: Best for: A concise description, a short observation, or a quick reaction to an event.
dropdown_prompts.prompt_template: Write a short vignette, exactly 3-5 sentences long, focusing on: [USER_INPUT_STORY_IDEA]. Ensure it conveys a clear mood or observation.
dropdown_prompts.post_processing_note: Trim to fit 3-5 sentences. If less than 3 sentences, consider a small expansion prompt or accept as is.

dropdown_prompts.name: Short Scene (1-2 Paragraphs)
dropdown_prompts.description: Best for: A single, focused moment, a brief interaction, or setting a quick mood.
dropdown_prompts.prompt_template: Create a short scene in 1-2 distinct paragraphs about: [USER_INPUT_STORY_IDEA]. Focus on a single moment or brief interaction. Ensure clear paragraph separation.
dropdown_prompts.post_processing_note: Identify paragraph breaks. If more than 2 paragraphs, trim to 2. If less than 1, regenerate or flag.

dropdown_prompts.name: Developing Scene (3-4 Paragraphs)
dropdown_prompts.description: Best for: Expanding on a specific event, showing a mini-conflict, or introducing a new element.
dropdown_prompts.prompt_template: Generate a developing scene, structured into 3-4 distinct paragraphs, exploring: [USER_INPUT_STORY_IDEA]. Include elements that expand on a specific event or introduce a mini-conflict. Ensure clear paragraph separation.
dropdown_prompts.post_processing_note: Identify paragraph breaks. If outside 3-4 paragraphs, trim or attempt slight expansion if significantly under.

dropdown_prompts.name: Standard Passage (5-7 Paragraphs)
dropdown_prompts.description: Best for: A more complete scene, developing a minor plot point, or a significant character interaction.
dropdown_prompts.prompt_template: Write a standard passage for a story, structured into 5-7 well-developed paragraphs, detailing: [USER_INPUT_STORY_IDEA]. Focus on creating a more complete scene or developing a minor plot point. Ensure clear paragraph separation.
dropdown_prompts.post_processing_note: Identify paragraph breaks. If outside 5-7 paragraphs, trim or attempt slight expansion.

dropdown_prompts.name: Chapter Segment (8-12+ Paragraphs)
dropdown_prompts.description: Best for: A substantial section of a story, exploring multiple facets of a scene or event, or concluding a mini-arc.
dropdown_prompts.prompt_template: Generate a substantial chapter segment, structured into 8-12 distinct paragraphs, covering: [USER_INPUT_STORY_IDEA]. Explore multiple facets of the scene or event, potentially concluding a mini-arc. Ensure clear paragraph separation.
dropdown_prompts.post_processing_note: Identify paragraph breaks. If significantly over 12, trim. If significantly under 8, consider iterative generation.

dropdown_prompts.name: Outline / Synopsis (Variable Length)
dropdown_prompts.description: Best for: A structured summary of the story, key plot points, character arcs, and thematic ideas.
dropdown_prompts.prompt_template: Provide a detailed outline or synopsis for a story about: [USER_INPUT_STORY_IDEA]. Include key plot points (beginning, rising action, climax, falling action, resolution), main characters and their arcs, and potential thematic ideas. Organize into clear sections.
dropdown_prompts.post_processing_note: Review for logical flow and completeness of outline elements. Trimming based on section completeness rather than strict paragraph count.

dropdown_prompts.name: Custom Length...
dropdown_prompts.description: Allows user to specify custom length (paragraphs, sentences, or words).
dropdown_prompts.prompt_template_placeholder: This prompt will be dynamically generated based on user input. Examples below.
dynamic_prompt_examples: Generate approximately [X] words about: [USER_INPUT_STORY_IDEA]. Ensure it is coherent and flows well.
dropdown_prompts.max_tokens_calculation: Approximately [X * 15] to [X * 25] for paragraphs; [X * 10] to [X * 15] for sentences; [X * 1.5] for words.
dropdown_prompts.post_processing_note: Crucial for precise control. Extensive trimming/expansion logic required to meet exact user specifications.

dropdown_prompts.name: AI Decides (No Specific Limit)
dropdown_prompts.description: Best for: Allowing the AI to generate content until it naturally concludes a coherent idea or narrative, without a hard stop.
dropdown_prompts.prompt_template: Generate a complete and coherent story or narrative about: [USER_INPUT_STORY_IDEA]. Continue until the story reaches a natural conclusion or a logical stopping point.
dropdown_prompts.max_tokens_guidance: No specific `max_tokens` applied, or a very high default like 4000 (depending on model limits) to allow full generation.
dropdown_prompts.post_processing_note: Minimal post-processing, primarily for formatting and ensuring narrative completeness without abrupt cuts.
